user.title: Joyonway Spa Setup
user.description:
Connect to your Joyonway spa via USR-W610 RS485-to-WiFi bridge.

Prerequisites:
- W610 in Transparent TCP mode (NOT Modbus)
- W610 baudrate set to 38400 8N1
- No other client (Joyonway app) connected to the W610
- For heater control: activate 'Thermostat manuel' in PB555 panel menu

abort.already_configured: This W610 IP is already configured.
